response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a Senior Fullstack Developer with 6+ years at top-tier companies (Google, Meta) and a strong background in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud technologies. His work on AI-agent infrastructure, high-performance systems, and open-source projects aligns well with the role's requirements. While his primary stack is strong, some secondary technologies (e.g., Kotlin/Java) are less emphasized, and his recent AI work may overshadow traditional fullstack depth.
strengths: Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern fullstack development at scale (Google, Meta)
Strong AI/ML agent development experience, including MCP integration and developer tooling
Diverse technical background with contributions to open-source, high-performance systems, and DevOps
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js, Vitest, or PostgreSQL (though experience with similar stacks suggests adaptability)
Recent AI-focused role (Google) may reduce hands-on fullstack development time compared to traditional roles
Some secondary stack gaps (e.g., Kotlin/Java usage not prominently highlighted in recent roles)
